---
title: publications
listing:
  sort: "date desc"
  contents: "../publications/content/*/index.qmd"
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
  feed: true
  type: default
  image-align: right
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: "#EDF3F9"
title-block-banner-color: body
search: true
---

orcid{{< fa brands fa-orcid >}}: [0000-0001-8824-8809](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8824-8809)

I have tagged manuscripts I have authored or co-authored as "First Author" 

- First Author  – Research I led, executed, analyzed, and wrote as part of my thesis work on Influenza B virus.
- Contributions – Porojects led by my wnderful colleagues where I provided supporting contributions.
